# Format Examples

## Document Conversion
- Convert PDF reports to DOCX for editing
- Transform PPTX presentations to PDF for distribution
- Extract text from scanned documents via OCR

## Table/Data Conversion
- Convert CSV data files to Excel spreadsheets
- Export database results to XLSX format
- Transform delimited data between formats

## Image Processing
- Convert PNG screenshots to JPG for web optimization
- Transform TIFF scans to WEBP for modern web use
- Resize and compress images in batch

## Animation Optimization
- Optimize GIF files for smaller file sizes
- Convert between animation formats
- Adjust frame rates and quality settings

## Video Transcoding
- Convert MOV files from cameras to MP4 for web
- Transform AVI videos to WEBM for modern browsers
- Adjust video resolution and bitrate

## Audio Conversion
- Convert WAV recordings to MP3 for storage
- Transform FLAC files to compressed formats
- Normalize audio levels across files

## OCR Text Extraction
- Extract text from scanned documents
- Convert images to searchable PDFs
- Process handwritten notes (with limitations)

## CAD File Handling
- Convert DXF drawings to SVG for web display
- Export CAD data to standard formats
- Prepare technical drawings for sharing

## Subtitle Processing
- Convert SRT subtitles to VTT for web videos
- Synchronize subtitle timing
- Transform between subtitle formats

## Advanced Use Cases
- Batch processing multiple files
- URL-based remote file conversion
- Base64 encoded data processing
- Large file streaming conversion
